title: Messaging hierarchy.
lede: The story we lead with — top of the hierarchy down to the supporting messages.
keyMessage: The single key message — the one thing they should walk away with.
secondaryMessages: Secondary message #1 — supporting proof point one.
Secondary message #2 — supporting proof point two.
Secondary message #3 — supporting proof point three.
writingGuidelines: It's part of the AI Work Platform — not separated. Always position it as part of the whole.
You can (and should) spotlight specific features — just make sure to connect them to the wider story.
For technical personas, use technical language: MCP, APIs, agents, workflows.
Use concrete examples. Real customer scenarios beat abstract claims.

sayDontSay.say: An evolution of monday's AI work platform.
sayDontSay.why: It's a continuation, not a reset.
